violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Table underneath the flat top needs to be cleaned. Bottom of the table next to the prep sink needs to be cleaned.

Backflow prevention. — --Backflow prevention device has not been installed or maintained on faucet as required. Hose used for spraying off dishes was not connected to a faucet with a blackflow prevention device.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Observed an employee rinsing a knife in the hand sink on the cook-line.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employee clothing stored with the single service items in the dry storage area.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Maintenance equipment, supplies and tools were not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. CO2 tanks next to the bag box pop area were unsecure.
Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Utensil was not suitable or dispensed effectively for self-service operations of ready-to-eat foods. Scooping ice with the glass being used for product.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Cold hold in the kitchen where sauces were kept were not maintaining a temperature of 41 degrees or less
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Several food containers are cracked and broken.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Ice machine needs cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Computers hanging in kitchen are very dusty.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. Single use cups were being used to scoop product.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
